But since all my rankings are mid-level, perhaps changing the hours won't drastically change things unless I target specific peak times. Maybe shifting to start earlier allows me to cover more ground before the rush gets too intense, leading to more efficient deliveries and higher earnings.

So, considering all this, starting at 7:00 AM could give me a head start on orders, and finishing at 19:00 would let me handle evening demand. That's an extra two hours in total but spread out to capture both morning and evening peaks.
